Services

Everything under one roof

From your first lesson to a full custom fitting, Josh offers a complete range of coaching and club services — all from a fully equipped Trackman 4 studio in Cambridgeshire.

In-Person Coaching

  • 30-minute focused session — ideal for targeting a specific issue
  • 1-hour full lesson — comprehensive analysis and improvement plan
PGA Qualified

Online Swing Analysis

  • Send your swing footage and receive a full video analysis
  • Personalised drills to address exactly what needs fixing
  • Ideal for golfers who can't come in person

Club Fitting

  • Lead multi-brand club fitter with 3+ years experience
  • TaylorMade Master Fitter accreditation
  • SAM Lab accredited fitting process
  • LAB Golf certified putter fitting
  • Golf Pride certified grip fitting
  • Full outdoor Trackman 4 studio
Multi-brand

Club Repairs

  • Re-shafting
  • Re-gripping
  • Loft and lie adjustments
  • Cutdowns and lengthening
  • And more — just ask
The studio

Full outdoor Trackman 4 studio

Every fitting and coaching session takes place in a fully equipped outdoor studio with Trackman 4 — the same technology used on the PGA Tour. Real data. Real conditions. Real results.

Trackman 4 radar technology
Full outdoor hitting bay
Multi-brand club selection
SAM Lab putting analysis
Data-driven fitting reports
Swing analysis

See exactly what's happening

Most golfers feel like something is wrong with their swing but can't identify what. Josh uses video analysis with data overlay to show you exactly where the issue is — and more importantly, how to fix it.

Online swing analysis is available for those who can't come in person. Send your footage, get a full breakdown and personalised drill programme back within 48 hours.

1
Film your swingFrom face-on and down-the-line angles
2
Send to JoshVia WhatsApp, email, or in-person
3
Receive your analysisFull video breakdown and drill programme
